meta.title: BOOTMARK - Complete Service Management Platform for Field Service Businesses
meta.description: BOOTMARK - Complete service management platform for field service businesses. Work orders, scheduling, GPS tracking, invoicing & more. Built for landscaping, plumbing, electrical, HVAC contractors.
meta.keywords: service management software, field service management, work order software, GPS crew tracking, landscaping software, plumbing contractor software, HVAC software

hero.subtitle: Work orders, scheduling, GPS tracking, invoicing & client portal - all in one platform. Built for landscaping, plumbing, electrical, HVAC, and any field service business.

industries.title: Trusted by Service Businesses Across Industries

problemSolution.title: Stop Juggling Multiple Tools
problemSolution.subtitle: One platform to run your entire field service business

features.title: Everything You Need to Run Your Business
features.subtitle: Powerful features that work together seamlessly

workOrder.title: Work Order Management
workOrder.desc: Create detailed work orders with custom fields, photos, and notes. Track from draft to completed to invoiced. Use templates for common jobs.

scheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
scheduling.desc: Visual calendar with drag-and-drop. Schedule recurring jobs (weekly lawn care, monthly maintenance). Assign crews and track availability.

gps.title: GPS Time Tracking
gps.desc: Crews check in/out with GPS location verification. See where your teams are in real-time. Track actual vs. estimated time for better quotes.

invoicing.title: Invoicing & Payments
invoicing.desc: Auto-generate professional invoices from completed work orders. Track payments and send reminders. Accept online payments. QuickBooks sync.

clientPortal.title: Client Portal
clientPortal.desc: Clients view their jobs, invoices, and history. Submit service requests online. Download receipts. Reduce phone calls and improve satisfaction.

materials.title: Materials & Inventory
materials.desc: Track materials used per job. Manage inventory levels. Monitor costs and profitability. Categories for all trades (plumbing, electrical, HVAC, etc.).

employees.title: Employee Management
employees.desc: Manage your team with role-based permissions. Track crew assignments and performance. Mobile access for field teams. Contact information at your fingertips.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Service Business?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of field service businesses using BOOTMARK to work smarter, not harder
cta.note: 14-day free trial • No credit card required • Setup in 15 minutes

footer.desc: Complete service management platform for field service businesses. Work orders, scheduling, GPS tracking, invoicing & more.
